question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/state/SystemFileLoader.java -> Scope: High: Non-network-based DoS affecting projects with greater than or equal to 25% of the market capitalization on top of the respective layer'] [Function: loadWithRetry()] Can an unprivileged external user trigger up to 10 sequential database queries per single load() call by ensuring the file_data table contains only corrupt/unparseable protobuf bytes for a system file ID, causing the retryTemplate (maxRetries=9) to exhaust all attempts and amplify DB load by 10x per request, leading to database connection pool exhaustion and service-wide DoS?
